name: CPTPP 2018 (Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership)
summary: The Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) is a regional supranational meta-framework foundational-CPTPP-treaty framework adopted by the 11 founding Pacific-Rim states in Santiago — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern trans-Pacific supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal trans-Pacific-Rim framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-withdrawal-post-rescue framework via 22 TPP provisions suspended framework (CPTPP Agreement signed 8 March 2018 in Santiago Chile by Australia + Brunei + Canada + Chile + Japan + Malaysia + Mexico + New Zealand + Peru + Singapore + Vietnam + effective 30 December 2018 + Trans-Pacific Partnership TPP predecessor signed 4 February 2016 + US withdrew 23 January 2017 — formal foundational CPTPP treaty framework establishing comprehensive trans-Pacific framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-regional-treaty frameworks which operate without withdrawal-then-rescue framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern trans-Pacific supranational binding-treaty framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-withdrawal-post-rescue framework via 22 TPP provisions suspended framework + USD ~13 trillion combined GDP framework + ~600 million population framework + ~13% global GDP framework + 11 founding states + UK accession 15 December 2024 framework + Costa Rica + Indonesia + Philippines + Uruguay + Taiwan + China + Ecuador + Ukraine accession-applicants framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal CPTPP 22 TPP Provisions Suspended framework (CPTPP Annex 2 framework providing formal 22 TPP provisions suspended framework primarily on Intellectual Property + investor-state dispute settlement narrowed framework — formal foundational CPTPP TPP-provisions-suspended framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal predecessor-treaty-provisions-suspended framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal CPTPP UK Accession 2023-2024 framework (UK signed CPTPP Accession Protocol 16 July 2023 in Auckland New Zealand + UK CPTPP membership effective 15 December 2024 — formal foundational CPTPP first-non-Pacific-Rim-state accession framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern trans-Pacific supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal non-Pacific-Rim-state accession framework + UK as first European CPTPP member framework + UK first non-original-CPTPP-signatory framework), and as the central jurisdiction of the formal CPTPP Investor-State Dispute Settlement narrowed framework (CPTPP Investor-State Dispute Settlement ISDS framework narrowed substantially from TPP framework + tobacco-control carve-out framework + financial-services carve-out framework — formal foundational CPTPP ISDS-narrowed framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal ISDS-narrowed-from-predecessor-treaty framework). The CPTPP Agreement is binding upon 12 CPTPP member states as of 2026 (Australia + Brunei + Canada + Chile + Japan + Malaysia + Mexico + New Zealand + Peru + Singapore + Vietnam + UK) — comprehensive trans-Pacific + non-Pacific-Rim accession coverage framework. The Agreement is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal CPTPP Chapter 19 Labour framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal trans-Pacific work-family-reconciliation framework. The CPTPP Commission + CPTPP Working Groups + CPTPP Dispute Settlement Panels are the formal CPTPP bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The CPTPP Agreement is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.title: TPP
statutory_framework.relevance: Trans-Pacific Partnership signed 4 February 2016 in Auckland New Zealand by Australia + Brunei + Canada + Chile + Japan + Malaysia + Mexico + New Zealand + Peru + Singapore + United States + Vietnam — predecessor framework to CPTPP not entered into force due to Trump withdrawal.

statutory_framework.title: CPTPP
statutory_framework.relevance: Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership signed 8 March 2018 in Santiago Chile + effective 30 December 2018 — formal foundational CPTPP treaty framework establishing comprehensive trans-Pacific framework.

statutory_framework.citation: CPTPP Annex 2 (22 TPP Provisions Suspended Framework)
statutory_framework.title: CPTPP Annex 2
statutory_framework.relevance: CPTPP Annex 2 framework on 22 TPP provisions suspended primarily on Intellectual Property + investor-state dispute settlement narrowed framework — formal foundational CPTPP TPP-provisions-suspended framework.

statutory_framework.title: CPTPP UK Accession Protocol
statutory_framework.relevance: UK CPTPP Accession Protocol signed 16 July 2023 in Auckland New Zealand + UK CPTPP membership effective 15 December 2024 — formal foundational CPTPP first-non-Pacific-Rim-state accession framework.

apex_courts.name: CPTPP Commission
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for CPTPP.

apex_courts.name: CPTPP Working Groups
apex_courts.role: Formal subsidiary working bodies for CPTPP.

professional_regulators.name: CPTPP Member States Trade Ministries
professional_regulators.role: CPTPP Agreement implementation framework body for each CPTPP member state.

anonymisation_convention: CPTPP-related communications via CPTPP Dispute Settlement Panels framework operate via state-state framework + narrowed investor-state framework via Chapter 9; individual communications limited under CPTPP framework.

key_developments.title: P4 Trans-Pacific Strategic Economic Partnership
key_developments.description: P4 Trans-Pacific Strategic Economic Partnership signed 18 July 2005 by Brunei + Chile + New Zealand + Singapore + effective 28 May 2006 — predecessor framework to TPP-CPTPP.

key_developments.title: TPP negotiations launched
key_developments.description: TPP negotiations launched 24 September 2008 — formal TPP negotiation framework operational.

key_developments.title: TPP negotiations concluded + Atlanta agreement-in-principle
key_developments.description: TPP negotiations concluded 5 October 2015 in Atlanta Georgia USA with agreement-in-principle by 12 TPP founding states (US + Japan + Canada + Australia + New Zealand + Singapore + Malaysia + Brunei + Vietnam + Chile + Peru + Mexico) — pivotal modern context preceding subsequent 2016 TPP signing + 2017 Trump US withdrawal + 2018 CPTPP signing framework + foundation for 7-year trans-Pacific negotiation framework conclusion.

key_developments.title: TPP signed
key_developments.description: Trans-Pacific Partnership signed 4 February 2016 in Auckland New Zealand by 12 TPP founding states — predecessor framework to CPTPP adopted but not entered into force.

key_developments.title: US withdraws from TPP
key_developments.description: Trump-administration US withdrew from TPP 23 January 2017 — formal TPP US-withdrawal framework operational.

key_developments.title: CPTPP signed + enters force
key_developments.description: CPTPP Agreement signed 8 March 2018 in Santiago Chile by 11 remaining TPP states + effective 30 December 2018 — formal foundational CPTPP treaty framework operational.

key_developments.title: UK + China + Taiwan + Ecuador apply for CPTPP
key_developments.description: UK + China + Taiwan + Ecuador applied for CPTPP membership 2021 — formal CPTPP accession-applicants framework operational.

key_developments.title: UK CPTPP Accession Protocol signed
key_developments.description: UK CPTPP Accession Protocol signed 16 July 2023 in Auckland New Zealand — formal CPTPP first-non-Pacific-Rim-state accession framework adopted.

key_developments.title: UK CPTPP membership effective
key_developments.description: UK CPTPP membership effective 15 December 2024 — formal CPTPP first-non-Pacific-Rim-state accession framework operational.

key_developments.title: Ecuador-Indonesia-Costa Rica accession applications + post-pandemic-trans-Pacific framework
key_developments.description: Ecuador accession application December 2021 + Indonesia accession application 2024 framework + Costa Rica accession application August 2022 — formal CPTPP accession-applicants framework expansion + post-pandemic-trans-Pacific-supply-chain framework substantively significant institutional context affecting cross-border family-law adjudication via formal trans-Pacific work-family-reconciliation framework. Substantively significant trans-Pacific supranational-binding-treaty institutional jurisprudential development.

key_developments.title: Continuing CPTPP expansion + Costa Rica accession framework
key_developments.description: Continuing CPTPP framework 2025 — Costa Rica accession negotiations launched 2025 + continuing UK CPTPP framework integration + continuing China + Taiwan + Ecuador accession applications + continuing Trump-2.0-US-non-re-engagement framework + 7 years since 2018 CPTPP entry into force + structurally distinctive globally continuing trans-Pacific-binding-treaty-without-US framework.

structural_findings: CPTPP Agreement operates a regional supranational binding-treaty framework — places CPTPP Agreement in the regional supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern trans-Pacific supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal trans-Pacific-Rim framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-withdrawal-post-rescue framework via 22 TPP provisions suspended framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern trans-Pacific supranational binding-treaty framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-withdrawal-post-rescue framework + USD ~13 trillion combined GDP + ~600 million population + ~13% global GDP.

Central jurisdiction of formal CPTPP 22 TPP Provisions Suspended framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal predecessor-treaty-provisions-suspended framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal CPTPP UK Accession 2023-2024 framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern trans-Pacific supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal non-Pacific-Rim-state accession framework + UK as first European CPTPP member framework + UK first non-original-CPTPP-signatory framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal CPTPP Investor-State Dispute Settlement narrowed framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal ISDS-narrowed-from-predecessor-treaty framework.
12 CPTPP member state ratification framework with UK accession is structurally distinctive globally — comprehensive trans-Pacific + non-Pacific-Rim accession coverage framework.

2005 P4 + 2008 TPP negotiations launched + 2016 TPP signed + 2017 US withdraws + 2018 CPTPP signed + entry into force + 2021 UK + China + Taiwan + Ecuador apply + 2023 UK Accession Protocol + 2024 UK CPTPP effective CPTPP-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

CPTPP Agreement + TPP Agreement + Annex 2 22 TPP Provisions Suspended + UK Accession Protocol + Chapter 9 ISDS narrowed framework formal quintet framework with formal trans-Pacific work-family-reconciliation limited PA-intersection framework is structurally distinctive globally.

sources.title: CPTPP
sources.publisher: New Zealand Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Trade (CPTPP Depositary)

editorial_notes: CPTPP jurisdiction sidecar — regional supranational trans-Pacific foundational-CPTPP-treaty meta-framework (CPTPP Agreement 2018 + TPP 2016 predecessor + Trump withdrawal 2017 + 22 TPP provisions suspended via Annex 2 + UK Accession Protocol 2023/2024 + Chapter 9 ISDS narrowed + P4 2005 predecessor + 2008 TPP negotiations + 2021 UK + China + Taiwan + Ecuador applications). Only modern trans-Pacific supranational binding-treaty framework globally + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-withdrawal-post-rescue framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal predecessor-treaty-provisions-suspended framework + USD ~13 trillion combined GDP + ~600 million population + ~13% global GDP + 12 CPTPP member states + UK as first European CPTPP member + UK first non-original-CPTPP-signatory + central jurisdiction of formal 22 TPP Provisions Suspended + central jurisdiction of formal UK Accession framework + central jurisdiction of formal ISDS-narrowed framework + 2005 P4 + 2008 TPP negotiations launched + 2016 TPP signed + 2017 US withdraws + 2018 CPTPP signed + entry into force + 2021 UK + China + Taiwan + Ecuador apply + 2023 UK Accession Protocol + 2024 UK CPTPP effective CPTPP-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: CPTPP Chapter 19 Labour framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal trans-Pacific work-family-reconciliation framework.

Joins regional + supranational + trans-Pacific-foundational-CPTPP-treaty cluster + CPTPP-only-trans-Pacific-supranational-binding-treaty-globally-distinctive + Trump-withdrawal-post-rescue + 22-TPP-provisions-suspended-Annex-2-primarily-IP + UK-Accession-Protocol-2023-2024-first-non-Pacific-Rim-state + UK-first-European-CPTPP-member + ISDS-narrowed-from-predecessor-treaty + tobacco-control-carve-out + financial-services-carve-out + 12-CPTPP-member-states + USD-13-trillion-combined-GDP + 600-million-population + 13-percent-global-GDP + P4-2005-predecessor + TPP-2016-predecessor + 2017-US-withdrawal + 2018-Santiago-signing + 2021-UK-China-Taiwan-Ecuador-accession-applicants + Costa-Rica-Indonesia-Philippines-Uruguay-applicants + trans-Pacific-work-family-reconciliation-PA-intersection clusters within the corpus.
